title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Shutenmaru, Kiku, Kozuki Oden, Kinemon, Jack as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm more worried about big bro luffy than my injuries right now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy's recovery speed is like that of a monster's...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And his spirit won't be broken, either!!! He'll be fine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Raizo said that he'll assist with the prison break mission.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since he said so himself, let's just leave it to him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: NIN! NIN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: MT. ATAMAYAMA

dialogue.speaker: Shutenmaru
dialogue.text: I've misjudged you, Ashura!!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Kiku...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Be grateful that I'm leaving without taking any of your belongings.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you forget!? Our relationship has been like this since the beginning.

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Oden
dialogue.text: I admired a man named Oden...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I, a Samurai, risked my life for him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, I don't remember swearing to serve the

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kozuki family!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was an even match for master InLara- shi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Isn't that right... MOMONO- Suke!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, you should be the one to remember...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The type of person that I am!! I'll definitely make you our ally.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll commend you if you manage to do that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you think that everyone would be happy that the Kozuki family's Samuel have returned!?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: You abandoned this country for 20 years!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The BLANK that you left behind will never be filled!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The offerings from Kuri have been pretty low recently.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: with doflamingo gone... you DO know where to go for our next trade deal, don't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: ...they're mad at Jack again...

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: Jack... is being scolded!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We already have one burdensome person here. It's that idiot, queen.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right!! We only need one, and it's that scumbag, king.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: beasts pirates all-star KING THE WILDFIRE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Beasts pirates all-star

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: Do you understand, Jack the DRAG- DOWN!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Beasts pirates all-star

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, big brothers....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're no better, Queen. How long does it take for you to break the spirits of a few cheeky brats!? You're incompetent!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Shut your trap, you torture-loving perverted bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: More deadly calamities to watch out for....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What'd you say!!?

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 38 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
